personal_info.name: Antonio Acquavia
personal_info.summary: Dedicated IT professional with a background in Artificial Intelligence and Data Engineering, complemented by hands-on experience as a Data Engineer and Software Engineer. Over the past two years, I have been deeply involved in developing a Core Banking product, where I have honed my skills in product management and product development.

education.degree: Master's degree in Artificial Intelligence and Data Engineering
education.highlights: Thesis carried out abroad in collaboration with University of Glasgow.

education.degree: Bachelor's degree in Scienze e Tecnologie Informatiche

experience.description: Part of an international team developing Core Banking software products. Started by owning a critical backend component built with Quarkus, responsible for core business logic. Progressively took ownership of end-to-end feature development, growing from lower-impact deliverables to leading the early-stage development of a new product. Gained hands-on experience in software product thinking, going beyond requirements to understand customer needs.
tasks: Owned and maintained a critical Quarkus backend component containing core business logic.
Led end-to-end feature development with increasing scope and business impact.
Contributed to the early-stage development of a new product, from design to implementation.
Collaborated with Product Management to translate customer needs into technical requirements.
Contributed to architectural decisions and cross-team alignment.

experience.description: Set up a Data Platform from scratch for a customer approaching the data world for the first time. Built end-to-end ETL pipelines retrieving data from external APIs, landing it on Azure Data Lake, processing and refining it with Databricks, and exposing the output through Power BI dashboards.
tasks: Designed and implemented ETL pipelines ingesting data from external APIs into Azure Data Lake.
Processed and refined raw data using Databricks and PySpark across multiple lake layers.
Built Power BI dashboards consuming refined data from the lake for business reporting.
Contributed to architectural decisions for a customer building their first Data Platform.

experience.description: Explored static pruning techniques from the inverted index literature and investigated their applicability to dense retrieval indexes. The work required an in-depth study of how search engines work, both in the classical term-based era and after the introduction of neural networks into the retrieval pipeline.
tasks: Conducted a deep literature review on static pruning techniques applied to inverted indexes.
Studied classical and neural information retrieval models, including BERT-based dense retrievers (ColBERT).
Designed and experimented with static pruning strategies adapted to dense retrieval indexes.
Published results at DocEng'23: 'Static Pruning for Multi-Representation Dense Retrieval'.

publication.title: Static Pruning for Multi-Representation Dense Retrieval

experience.description: Development of mobile applications for iOS devices.
tasks: Creation of graphical user interfaces using xCode and Swift.
Usage of REST API to get data from a server and show them in the application.

projects.name: Football Archive
projects.description: Full-stack web application for managing amateur football leagues. Allows creating and managing competitions, editions, phases and groups, with standings and match results.

projects.name: Secure Messaging
projects.description: Messaging application with a console interface which uses OpenSSL to ensure confidentiality, integrity and authentication to the messages.

projects.name: Convolutional Neural Network for Medical Imaging Analysis
projects.description: Group project for the exam of Computational Intelligence and Deep Learning. The goal is to classify the images of CBIS DDSM dataset to make a breast cancer abnormalities diagnosis.

projects.name: K-Means with MapReduce
projects.description: Group project for the Cloud Computing exam. The goal is to implement the K-Means clustering algorithm in a distributed manner, exploiting the map-reduce paradigm.

interests.detail: Historical novels, thriller, fantasy, historical essays, manga
